steps.title: Let's build a Pin on Image slide!
steps.description: A Pin on Image slide lets participants tap directly on a custom image to mark their answer — perfect for maps, diagrams, and spatial feedback. We'll build one together in under a minute. Click Next to begin.

steps.title: Create a new presentation
steps.description: Click 'New Presentation' to start a fresh deck.

steps.title: Pick the Pin on Image slide type
steps.description: Select 'Pin on Image' from the slide type picker. You'll find it in the Unscored section — it's the one that turns any image into an interactive pin-dropping activity.

steps.title: Write your question
steps.description: Type a spatial prompt for your audience — something that tells them exactly where to look and what to mark.

action.value: Where on this map is your hometown?
action.hint: Type your question, then click away

steps.title: Ready to go live!
steps.description: That's all it takes to build a Pin on Image slide. Upload your own image in the Content panel, then hit 'Present' when you're ready — your audience joins on their phones and pins their answers directly on the image in real time.
